race.comment: DYNAMITE DANCER (6) looks the one to beat. He's a lightly raced gelding who has been right there in two runs back, just missing an inform horse at Ballarat Synthetic first up before an even effort onto heavy ground at Geelong. She should come on from that and gets every hope from the gate. QUEEN CHRISTINE (11) has just been fair her past couple but had been coming along nicely prior and can improve back onto her home deck. BAZZAR (5) presents third up having gotten a long way back from a very wide gate at Bendigo last time, also dropping back to 1000m. This should suit better. MOONRAKER (2) put in a good effort third up at Morphettville at big odds when holding onto second. He'll roll forward and take catching. LEGACY BEL (7) goes in based on the fresh win at big odds.
